message:
🐛 fix(intoto): eliminate concurrent mutation of allStatuses in scan loop (#8279)

Previously each concurrent task mutated the shared `allStatuses` map
from inside the callback, while also calling `settledWithConcurrency`
which schedules tasks in parallel. In rare interleavings this caused
the final aggregate to drop entries and the test to fail non-deterministically.

Return the (cluster, status) pair from each task and build the aggregate
from the settled results after all tasks resolve. Per-cluster streaming
via setStatuses still happens inside the callback.

Fixes #8270

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
